title: Travis Mccullough
compiled_truth: Travis Mccullough is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-09), Travis Mccullough sent 144 and received 1004 emails, totalling 1148 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (58), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (41), [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (17), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (17), [Elizabeth Sager](people/elizabeth-sager) (15).
